items.title: Loading a prompt template
items.scenario: A chatbot keeps its system prompt in data/prompts/system.txt and loads it at startup.
items.explanation: Path('data/prompts/system.txt').read_text() reads the file cross-platform without manual open/close.

items.title: Reading the API key from the environment
items.scenario: A deployment injects OPENAI_API_KEY as an environment variable instead of committing it to code.
items.explanation: os.environ.get('OPENAI_API_KEY') retrieves it; returning None (instead of crashing) lets you show a clear setup error.

items.title: Ingesting a folder of documents for RAG
items.scenario: A pipeline must embed every Markdown file under docs/, including nested folders.
items.explanation: Path('docs').rglob('*.md') recursively yields each file path to read and chunk.

items.title: Creating a cache directory
items.scenario: Embeddings are cached to .cache/embeddings/ which may not exist yet.
items.explanation: Path('.cache/embeddings').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) creates the full path and won't error if it already exists.
